Darius.trading_pattern: Darius Q bleed is oppressive. Your crit scaling helps but his early pressure is massive.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: His Q outer ring bleed — walk at him to avoid. Your ult saves you from his R.
Darius.early_game: Darius dominates early. Play passive and farm. Your ult at 6 changes the matchup.
Darius.mid_game: Your crit scales. His ult is deadly — ult when low. Avoid low HP duels.
Darius.late_game: Even — both scale well. Your ult vs his execute.
Darius.win_condition: Survive early, farm passively. Scale into crit. Use ult to survive his R.
Darius.scaling: Even — both scale well into late game.
Darius.positioning: Farm safely. Keep distance from his bleed. Use ult defensively.

Garen.mid_game: Your crit scales. His tankiness scales. Avoid extended fights.
Garen.late_game: Even — both scale well. Your crit vs his tankiness.
Garen.win_condition: Survive early, farm passively. Scale into crit. Use ult defensively.
Garen.positioning: Farm safely. Avoid his Q silence range. Use ult defensively.
